(parox.).  AK. 1,1,5,12 . 3,4,13,50 .  H. 269 .  HALĀY. 1,145 . 5,74 . ṛṣīṇām  ṚV. 1,84,2 . 6,34,1 . jarituḥ 10,31,5 .  NIR. 7,3 .  ŚAT. results.rendered_html:
stuti f. [stu-ktin]
1 Praise, eulogy, commendation, laudation, stutibhyo vyatiricyaṃte dūrāṇi caritāni te  R. 10. 30. 
2 A hymn of praise, panegyric;  R. 4. 6. 
3 Adulation; flattery, empty or false praise; bhūtārthavyāhṛtiḥ sā hi na stutiḥ paramoṣṭhinaḥ  R. 10. 33. 
4 N. of Durgā.
Comp.
— gītaṃ a panegyric, hymn.
— padaṃ an object of praise.
— pāṭhakaḥ a panegyrist, an encomiast, a minstrel, bard, herald.
— vādaḥ a laudatory speech, panegyric.
— vrataḥ a bard.
